description.en: Returns aDOMExceptionin the event of an unsuccessful request, indicating what went wrong.

excerpt.en: Returns aDOMExceptionin the event of an unsuccessful request, indicating what went wrong.

description.en: Returns aDOMExceptionindicating the type of error that occurred when there is an unsuccessful transaction. This property isnullif the transaction is not finished, is finished and successfully committed, or was aborted with theIDBTransaction.abort()function.
